alt: Norwegian Luna cruise ship departing PortMiami with the Miami skyline behind her, showing the purple, pink and blue graffiti hull art by godmother ELLE and the Aqua Slidecoaster on the upper deck
description: Norwegian Luna (NCL, Prima Plus class, 2026) departing PortMiami on 25 April 2026 — about four weeks after her March 27, 2026 christening by godmother ELLE. The ELLE-designed graffiti hull art is visible along the starboard side; the Aqua Slidecoaster structure is visible on the upper deck.
title: Norwegian Luna leaving PortMiami
